news.summary: AUBURN HILLS, Mich., May 29, 2025 - The Jeep® brand has officially announced that the brand-new Cherokee is scheduled to launch towards the end of 2025. Completely redesigned, the upcoming Jeep Cherokee will revolutionize North America's leading vehicle category, offering innovative features to midsize SUV shoppers...
news.headline: New Jeep Cherokee to debut in late 2025, redefining midsize SUV segment in North America. - Auburn Hills, Mich., May 29, 2025.

news.summary: In Lakewood, New Jersey on May 29, 2025, International Spice, a leading supplier of private label and gourmet seasonings, is encouraging grill enthusiasts and chefs to enhance their summer meals with a variety of custom-crafted blends as BBQ season begins.
news.headline: International Spice in Lakewood, N.J., offers custom seasonings for BBQ, enticing grill masters with global-inspired blends.

news.summary: In New York today, Wolters Kluwer revealed plans to conduct a targeted Open Innovation Hackathon aimed at investigating potential AI uses in international arbitration. The hackathon, organized by the Kluwer Arbitration team in partnership with the American Arbitration Association – International Centre for Dispute Resolution® (AAA-ICDR®), is scheduled to commence at 9am CEST on June 11, 2025. The venue for this event will be the Amare culture and conference center located in The Hague, The Netherlands. This initiative aims to bring together experts from various fields to collaborate on exploring innovative AI solutions for international arbitration.
news.headline: Wolters Kluwer hosts AI Hackathon for arbitration on June 11, 2025 in The Hague, Netherlands in collaboration with AAA-ICDR.

news.summary: In Dallas, MediaPSC, formerly known as The Plastic Surgery Channel, has revealed their new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) as Scott Jorgensen. Jorgensen, a member of the company's Board of Directors since 2010, possesses significant expertise in healthcare technology, finance, and digital media. The appointment of Jorgensen follows the company's rebranding and signals a shift in focus beyond plastic surgery. This move signifies a fresh start for MediaPSC as it ventures into new areas under Jorgensen's leadership.
news.headline: MediaPSC appoints Scott Jorgensen as new CEO, bringing extensive healthcare technology and finance leadership experience.
India's Goyal: India is well on track in trade discussions with the US.

news.summary: A renowned video production company initially known as The Plastic Surgery Channel has revealed a new identity as MediaPSC in Dallas. The rebrand signifies the firm's broader scope in the healthcare sector beyond plastic surgery. Established in 2009 by leading plastic surgeons, the company now offers services covering various fields like dermatology, dentistry, fertility, sports medicine, and more. Situated in Dallas, Texas, MediaPSC has expanded its expertise to cater to a wider audience since its inception.
news.headline: Plastic Surgery Channel rebrands to MediaPSC, showcasing wider healthcare expertise, serving industries like dermatology, dentistry. Founded in 2009, Dallas, Texas.

news.summary: In Exton, Pennsylvania, on May 29, 2025, Automated Financial Systems, Inc. (AFS®), a renowned company in commercial lending technology and insights, launches new improvements to loan pricing intelligence through the AFS Pricing Dashboard. This innovative tool aims to provide in-depth analysis and insights for better loan pricing strategies and decision-making processes. This update solidifies AFS's position as a leader in the industry, offering cutting-edge solutions to financial institutions. The introduction of the Pricing Dashboard showcases AFS's commitment to driving efficiency and profitability for its clients by offering comprehensive market insights. This development underscores AFS's dedication to continually enhancing its offerings to meet the evolving needs of the industry.
news.headline: AFS introduces AFS Pricing Dashboard to enhance commercial loan pricing intelligence. Industry leader in lending tech.

news.summary: sBUIDL can serve as collateral, traded, or utilized in DeFi protocols, all while retaining exposure to yield generated from the underlying Treasurys. This flexibility allows users to actively engage with their assets and potentially capitalize on the opportunities within the DeFi space.
news.headline: sBUIDL by BlackRock is a tokenized treasury fund that offers collateral, trading, and DeFi protocol use while maintaining Treasurys' yield.

news.summary: The Smart Manufacturing Market is estimated to be worth USD 297.20 billion in 2023 and is anticipated to increase to USD 787.54 billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 14.9% as detailed in a recent report by The Research Insights. Major factors contributing to this rapid expansion include technological advancements and increasing adoption of smart manufacturing solutions worldwide.
news.headline: Global Smart Manufacturing Market to reach $787.54 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 14.9%; valued at $297.20 billion in 2023.

news.summary: Cetera has announced the appointment of Andina Anderson as Managing Director, a move that aims to expedite the expansion of their RIA services. The company intends to enhance support for independent advisors by providing specialized infrastructure, technology resources, and compliance assistance within their Wealth Hub architecture. This strategic decision is part of Cetera's effort to bolster their offerings for independent advisors. The announcement was made on May 29, 2025 in San Diego.
news.headline: Cetera appoints Andina Anderson to lead RIA Blueprint Platform, expanding services for independent advisors.

news.summary: Lawyers Coleman Cowan and Donald Clack successfully obtained a sizable judgment for the family of a woman who was tragically killed in a suspected road rage incident. Taking place in Durham, North Carolina, the attorneys from the Law Offices of James Scott Farrin secured a substantial $5.1 million settlement for the family.
news.headline: $5.1M verdict won by Farrin Attorneys in Johnston County wrongful death case involving possible road rage incident.

news.summary: In Tokyo on May 29, 2025, Simplex Quantum, a medical technology startup, was acknowledged as one of the top 20 MedTech startups in the Asia-Pacific region. The company focuses on AI-powered heart health solutions.
news.headline: Tokyo-based Simplex Quantum chosen as top 20 MedTech startup in Asia Pacific for AI heart failure detection.

news.summary: Redwood City-based Electronic Arts Inc. and its subsidiary EA SPORTS have announced the official reveal trailer and game details for EA SPORTS College Football 26. The game features over 2,700 new plays, thousands of real college athletes, and authentic coaching styles from 300 real-world coaches. With heart-pounding road game environments at all 136 FBS schools, players can experience iconic traditions and intense gameplay. Fans can progress from high school recruit to Heisman contender in this immersive sports gaming experience.
news.headline: EA SPORTS™ College Football 26 released with 2,700 new plays, 136 FBS schools, 300 coaches, and thousands of real athletes.

news.summary: Today, the Pershing Square Foundation revealed that it has granted $5.25 million to seven innovative scientists across five prestigious institutions in New York City. This move marks an extension of their long-standing support for health initiatives in the region, particularly in the field of cancer research. This funding, facilitated through the Pershing Square Sohn Cancer Research Alliance (PSSCRA), has been instrumental in backing cutting-edge cancer research for more than ten years. Additionally, the Foundation has diversified its focus to include advancements in women's health, in line with their overarching mission.
news.headline: Pershing Square Foundation provides $5.25M Ovarian Cancer Challenge Grant to fund 7 scientists at 5 institutions.

news.summary: Hartford, Connecticut - The Hartford's Employee Benefits division is set to provide its customers with personalized recommendations during enrollment through Nayya's AI-driven benefits experience platform. This initiative aims to offer enhanced customization and individualized options to streamline the benefits enrollment process for employees. The integration of Nayya with various top HR technology platforms will cater to the needs of the company's employer-customers. This move is a part of The Hartford's commitment to improving the enrollment experience for its customers.
news.headline: The Hartford partners with Nayya to improve benefits enrollment with personalized recommendations, AI technology.

news.summary: St. Louis - Belden Inc. unveiled its latest innovation, the 10GXM13 Category 6A Cable, demonstrating the company's expertise in connection solutions. The cable, with a diameter of 0.230” (5.84 mm), establishes a new benchmark for compact Category 6A cables. Boasting improved channel performance, the 10GXM13 supports 100-meter lengths that adhere to Telecommunications Industry Association (TIA) standards. This development aligns with the broader trend towards digital transformation.
news.headline: Belden introduces new 10GXM13 Category 6A Cable with 0.230" diameter, 100-meter lengths, TIA compliance.

news.summary: In an effort to meet the increasing demand for hospital beds in Acworth and neighboring areas, Wellstar Health System in Marietta, Georgia has announced plans to construct a new hospital with a capacity of 230 beds. The proposal has been formally submitted to the Georgia Department of Community Health. The new facility aims to address the pressing healthcare needs of the region and enhance access to medical services for residents.
news.headline: Wellstar plans new 230-bed hospital in Acworth due to rising demand for hospital beds in area.

news.summary: In New York on May 29, 2025, Act To Change organized the 7th Annual National Day Against Bullying and Hate on May 17, 2025. The event brought together hundreds of young individuals, families, and partner groups from all over the country for a day focused on celebrating, sharing stories, and taking action against bullying and hate.
news.headline: Act To Change marks its 7th National Day Against Bullying with youth leadership showcase and awards in NYC. #AntiBullying #YouthLeadership.

news.summary: ENGIE North America (ENGIE) in partnership with Energy Research Consulting Group (ERCG) has unveiled the 2025 North American Business Energy Census on May 29, 2025. This report, now in its third year, encompasses input from a wide range of sources and provides essential market insights. The document includes opinions and data gathered from over X number of businesses across North America, offering a comprehensive overview of the current energy landscape.
news.headline: ENGIE Energy released the 2025 North American Business Energy Census highlighting rising prices, volatility, and shifting strategies.

news.summary: A new collection from Jacob's Pardon, the renowned American whiskey brand, has been introduced by F. Paul Pacult, an esteemed expert on Distilled Spirits. This release marks the beginning of a rare series, with the first edition being hand-selected. Jacob's Pardon, known for its rich history tracing back to Prohibition, has revealed this exclusive offering. This launch was announced in New York on May 29, 2025, showcasing the brand's dedication to exceptional quality and craftsmanship.
news.headline: Jacob's Pardon introduces 16-year-old Oloroso Sherry Cask-Finished Whiskey in new "Cask Collective" series by F. Paul Pacult.

news.summary: Discover Sony Electronics Inc.'s cutting-edge technologies that support users in various industries at the biggest professional audiovisual trade show in North America. Taking place from June 11 to June 13 in Paramus, New Jersey, Sony will exhibit its diverse range of products. This event is set to welcome a record number of attendees, with over 500 exhibitors and an estimated 20,000 visitors expected to participate. Be sure to visit Sony's booth to witness how their innovations are transforming the audiovisual landscape across vertical markets.
news.headline: Sony Electronics will feature its professional display solutions at InfoComm 2025, North America's largest AV trade show on June 11-13.

news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on May 29, 2025, it was announced that the PBA and CBS Sports have reached a new extended media rights agreement. Over the span of two years, there will be 31 hours of coverage airing on the CBS Television Network, along with simultaneous streaming on Paramount+ and CBS Sports Network during the 2026 season.
news.headline: CBS Sports gains media rights to PBA World Series of Bowling for 2 years, offering 31 hours on CBS and streaming on Paramount+ and CBS Sports, starting in 2026.

news.summary: In Tampa Bay, Florida on May 29, 2025, 200 high school girls were left in disbelief after being granted life-changing gifts from the "My Fairy Godfathers" Foundation. This foundation, led by philanthropists Andrew Ashton and Steven, aimed to support deserving individuals in the community.
news.headline: "My Fairy Godfathers" Foundation awards $10K in scholarships & 200 prom makeovers to Tampa Bay high school girls.

news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, on May 29, 2025, Total Health Oncology has been chosen as the sole provider for licensed ASCO Direct™ meetings across the United States. With a track record of over ten years, Total Health Oncology is recognized as a dedicated leader in the field of oncology.
news.headline: Total Health Oncology chosen as exclusive provider for licensed ASCO Direct meetings in the U.S., reaffirming its leadership in oncology.

news.summary: This week in Redmond, Washington, the Nintendo Download features new content for the Game Boy – Nintendo Switch Online. One highlight is SURVIVAL KIDS, a survival-role-playing game originally released in 1999 for the Game Boy Color. Players take on the role of a young child of an explorer, stranded on an uninhabited island after a storm hits during a cruise with their father. With no help available, players must rely on their survival skills to navigate the challenges. The game offers a nostalgic experience for fans of the original version and is now available on the Nintendo Switch platform.
news.headline: "Nintendo Download: Game Boy classic SURVIVAL KIDS now available on Nintendo Switch Online. Test your skills in surviving storm on an uninhabited island."

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects significant growth in the global electronic toll collection market. Expected to increase from USD 10.19 billion in 2025 to USD 15.20 billion by 2030, the market is forecasted to have a compound annual growth rate of 8.3% during this period. The surge in growth is attributed to various factors, with advancements in technology and increasing demand for efficient toll collection systems playing a crucial role.
news.headline: Global electronic toll collection market to reach $15.20 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 8.3%. Growth from $10.19 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Alpharetta, Georgia - Mativ, a global leader in specialty materials listed on NYSE with the symbol MATV, has achieved a notable milestone in their collaboration with Miru Smart Technologies. Miru is known for its innovative smart window technology. Mativ's specialized polymer film solutions under the brand Argotec have received their initial purchase order from a significant glass manufacturer. This purchase is for materials utilized in Miru's dynamic electrochromic window technology. This development signifies a significant advancement in the preparation for the supply of these materials.
news.headline: Mativ secures 1st commercial order for materials in Miru eWindow; partnership milestone reached with glass manufacturer.

news.summary: Evan Williams Bourbon, based in Bardstown, Kentucky, revealed the distinguished recipients of the 2025 American-Made Heroes award. These individuals are being commemorated on special edition Evan Williams Kentucky Straight Bourbon bottles that will be available across the country.
news.headline: Evan Williams Bourbon reveals 2025 American-Made Heroes to feature on limited-edition bottles across the U.S.

news.summary: In Durango, Colorado, on May 29, 2025, Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory Inc. (Nasdaq: RMCF) unveiled its first fully redesigned store at 415 King Street in Charleston, South Carolina. This grand opening, set for June 3, 2025, is a significant milestone as it marks the Company's debut in the state and initiates a nationwide rebranding effort for America’s Chocolatier™. Known for its premium chocolate and confectionary retail stores, RMCF is embarking on a strategic expansion with this new location, showcasing a fresh direction for the beloved brand.
news.headline: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory launches revamped store at 415 King Street in Charleston, SC on June 3, 2025, expanding nationwide.

news.summary: In a significant development, Certify, a data intelligence company based in New York, has reaffirmed its dedication to data security and compliance by achieving Service Organization Control (SOC) 2 Type 2 certification for the second year in a row. This milestone showcases the company's ongoing commitment to ensuring the protection and privacy of data. Achieving SOC 2 Type 2 compliance is a notable recognition of Certify's efforts in maintaining high standards of security and compliance.
news.headline: Certify attains SOC-2 Type 2 compliance for 3rd year in a row, showcasing dedication to data security.

news.summary: Torrance, California - On May 29, 2025, Criminal IP, the advanced threat intelligence platform created by AI SPERA under the leadership of CEO Byungtak Kang, revealed its debut at Infosecurity Europe 2025, the premier cybersecurity conference in Europe. This will mark the platform's inaugural appearance at the event, which attracts a large number of industry professionals and experts from around the world, including over [insert number] attendees and [insert number] exhibitors. news.summary: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR), a global leader in converting food waste into sustainable products and generating renewable energy, recently revealed its decision to dual list its common stock on NYSE Texas, a modern fully electronic equities exchange situated in Dallas, Texas. Randall C. Stuewe, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Darling, expressed that the move to become a founding member of NYSE Texas demonstrates the company's proactive stance towards the changing landscape of capital markets.
news.headline: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) joins NYSE Texas, a new equities exchange based in Dallas.CEO Randall C. Stuewe comments on the dual listing.

news.summary: Yves La Rose, the CEO of Vaulta Foundation, recently announced a significant partnership with leading self-custody wallet provider OKX Wallet. This collaboration includes the unveiling of a main wallet and roadmap for future development. The partnership was revealed in Las Vegas on May 29, 2025. Vaulta is a scalable operating system that supports Web3 Banking and offers fast, affordable transactions.
news.headline: Vaulta and OKX Wallet partner to accelerate Web3 banking adoption. CEO Yves La Rose unveils collaboration in Las Vegas.

news.summary: A special release of the Pennzoil® PXG® Golf Driver is the highlight of a promotional event taking place from May 29 to June 25 in Houston. This collaboration between Pennzoil and PXG brings together two performance-driven brands from the realms of motorsports and golf for a unique partnership. The limited-edition golf driver is set to captivate enthusiasts during this exclusive timeframe in Houston.
news.headline: Pennzoil and PXG present high-performance sweepstakes at Advance Auto Parts, featuring limited-edition golf driver; runs May 29-June 25.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, on May 29, 2025, Bonusly, a top employee recognition platform, introduced innovative video functionalities to transform the way employee appreciation is conveyed and acknowledged. These latest features allow organizations to incorporate a personalized, authentic element to the process, enhancing...
news.headline: Bonusly launches video recognition feature to enhance employee connections at work, revolutionizing recognition process.
